'''R2-4B''', pronounced '''Artoo-Forbee''' or simply '''Forbee''', was an [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]] used during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Originally owned by [[Lorn Moonrunner]], the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was eventually confiscated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] when it was found that its owner was in fact a former Imperial major. Assigned to the Imperial garrison in [[Argona]], the droid detonated a modified charge made to resemble a standard [[Restraining bolt/Legends|restraining bolt]], destroying much of the garrison.

==Appearances==
